zh.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville是Richard I de Talbot的兒子，於0980年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利可洛維爾。他於大約1020年與Marie "Adelina" de Meulan在英國英格蘭貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1077年7月25日在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯利希享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville是Richard I de Talbot的儿子，于0980年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利可洛維爾。他于大约1020年与Marie "Adelina" de Meulan在英国英格兰貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1077年7月25日在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯利希享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville was born in 0980, in Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France as the son of Richard I de Talbot. He married Marie "Adelina" de Meulan about 1020, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 July 1077, in Lisieux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville est né en 0980, à Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, fils de Richard I de Talbot. Il a épousé Marie "Adelina" de Meulan environ 1020, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1077, à Lisieux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville wurde 0980 in Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Richard I de Talbot geboren. Er hat um 1020 in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Marie "Adelina" de Meulan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Juli 1077 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Lisieux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville è nato il nel 0980 nel Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia come figlio di Richard I de Talbot. Lui sposato Marie "Adelina" de Meulan circa 1020, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 luglio 1077, nel Lisieux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuvilleは0980年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメクレウヴィルでRichard I de Talbotの息子として生まれた。約1020年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでMarie "Adelina" de Meulanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1077年7月25日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスリシエウックスで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville(은)는 0980년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 클레우빌에서 Richard I de Talbot의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1020년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 Marie "Adelina" de Meulan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1077년 7월 25일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 리시우스에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville nasceu em 0980, em Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França filho de Richard I de Talbot. Ele casou-se com Marie "Adelina" de Meulan aproximadamente 1020, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1077, em Lisieux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville родился в 0980 г. в местности клеувилл, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. Его отца звали Richard I de Talbot. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie "Adelina" de Meulan около 1020 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 июля 1077 г. в местности лисиеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville nació en 0980, en Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia como hijo de Richard I de Talbot. Se casó con Marie "Adelina" de Meulan aproximadamente 1020, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de julio de 1077, en Lisieux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 97 años.
